title: DeathStats
description: A simple Plugin that counts every players playerkills & deaths. You can see them using /kills <Player>, /deaths <player> or /leaderboard <kills/deaths>.
body:
# DeathStats Plugin


This is a Minecraft plugin based on Spigot/Paper that counts every players playerkills and deaths. 

## Commands
To see a specific players kills, use 
```
/kills <username>
```
To see a players deaths, use
```
/deaths <username>
```
**Leaderboards**
```
/leaderboard <deaths/kills>
```
will display a leaderboard of the top 10 Players.
